---
title: "Statistical Appendix"
author: "Sihan Zhuang"
format:
  html:
    toc: true
    number-sections: true
execute:
  echo: true
  warning: false
  message: false
---

# Additional Model Details

Use this appendix for extra comments, plots, model equations, and viable candidate models that were tried but not selected.

```{r}
if (basename(getwd()) == "report") {
  setwd("..")
}
```

# Data Processing Details

Document cleaning decisions and any transformations not shown in full in the main report.

# Candidate Models Not Selected

For each viable model:

- state the model equation;
- report key estimates or information criteria;
- show residual diagnostics;
- explain why it was not selected.

```{r}
source("R/03_models.R")
tfr_model_summary
birth_model_summary
```

# Extra Diagnostics

Include additional ACF, PACF, spectrum, unit-root, residual, characteristic-root, or cross-validation results.

```{r}
source("R/04_forecast_evaluation.R")
tfr_accuracy
birth_accuracy
```
